case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO SOLANO CO.** ARTHUR VICENT HERNANDEZ VS. WINTER CHEVROLET CO., INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING THE ACTION TO THE PROPER COURT AND REQUEST FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES (TRANSACTION ID # 200013359) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-2020 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-29-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-30-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-15-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING THE ACTION TO THE PROPER COURT AND REQUEST FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER TRANSFERRING ACTION AND REQUEST FOR REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE PARTIES' SEPTEMBER 2, 2020 JOINT STIPULATION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO SOLANO COUNTY. DEFENDANT MUST EMAIL THE STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-02-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. CASE TRANSFERRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2020 Continued To Dec-02-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Transferring The Action To The Proper Court And Request For Reasonable Attorney Fees And Expenses
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's Motion For Order Transferring The Action To The Proper Court And Request For Reasonable Attorney Fees And Expenses.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant General Motors LLC's motion for order transferring action and request for reasonable attorney fees and expenses is off calendar as moot in light of the parties' September 2, 2020 joint stipulation to transfer venue to Solano County. Defendant must email the stipulation and proposed order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2020 Continued To Sep-30-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
